content_body: Gary & Lissa - Thank you again for a fabulous home in the Georgia mountains. This is our 3rd cabin rental with you and once again the place offered us all the amenities one could ever ask for! This was a wonderful way to celebrate Joe's 50th and Valentine's Day. Relaxing, peaceful and romantic. The outdoor fireplace perfect. We look forward to our next visit. I'm shooting for Oct./Nov. - working on Joe. All the best.
title: Valentine's Day In North Georgia
